articles.title: Gilgeous-Alexander wins NBA's Clutch Player of Year award, topping Edwards, Murray
articles.original_title: Gilgeous-Alexander wins NBA's Clutch Player of Year award, topping Edwards, Murray
articles.summary: Gilgeous-Alexander, the Oklahoma City guard who is the reigning MVP and NBA Finals MVP, is the Clutch Player of the Year award winner for this season, the NBA announced Tuesday.  It’s the first of what could be several awards for Gilgeous-Alexander in the coming weeks.  “This award means a lot,” Gilgeous-Alexander said on NBC Sports, which aired the award announcement.
